title: python3.12 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[3.12.12-1]
- Update to 3.12.12
- Security fix for CVE-2025-8291 and CVE-2025-12084
Resolves: RHEL-128364, RHEL-135391
